title: NOAA Marine Life
description: A NOAA source card about marine organisms, habitats, adaptation, and ecosystem relationships.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA marine life resources introduce ocean organisms, adaptations, food webs, habitats, conservation questions, and human interactions with marine ecosystems.
Use this source for comparative reading about organisms, ecosystem roles, threats, and conservation evidence.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
